summary: A group of people, possibly adventurers, are trapped in a dungeon. They seem to be trying to escape and uncover the truth behind their confinement. One member, a strong magician, is concerned about his safety if they don't leave soon.
key_moments: They discover that one of their own members is trapped inside a dungeon
They encounter a mysterious figure who seems to possess holy power
They decide to take the corridor leading to the depths of the dungeon
